report.summary: Sixteenth standup Apr 2: 66 learn guides on disk (+5 since v14: Cosmos IBC, Crypto Points, Tokenomics, Sui Move, DeFi Vaults). Build-v19 added Cosmos IBC (726 lines) + Crypto Points (707 lines). Community-v16 extended to Oct 4 (399 tweets, newsletter v32 'North Korea vs DeFi'). EOD-v13 confirmed minimal code delta, 22 uncommitted files. 75 agent runs today ($7,291 human-equivalent). P0: commit+deploy remains critical — 8th consecutive standup escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v14→v15): Build-v17 produced Crypto Trading Bots + Prediction Markets + Portfolio Rebalancing + Airdrops guides. Build-v18 added Sui Move + DeFi Vaults + Concentrated Liquidity + Ethereum L2 + Tokenomics. Build-v19 added Cosmos IBC (726 lines) + Crypto Points (707 lines). Design-v14 created OG assets. EOD-v13 confirmed 22 uncommitted files, stable API routes. Community-v16 extended calendar to Oct 4 with 399 tweets + newsletter v32.
LEARN PAGES ON DISK: 66 (up from 61 at v14, 56 at start-of-day). 64 OG SVGs — 2 short of 1:1 parity (Cosmos IBC + Crypto Points likely pending design cycle).

COMMUNITY OUTPUT: 399 total tweets drafted (through Oct 4). Newsletter v32 ready ('North Korea vs DeFi'). Content calendar extends 26+ weeks. 2 new social card SVGs (DPRK Drift Exploit, BlackRock ETHB).

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $66,450 (-3.25%), ETH $2,030 (-4.4%), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear — record 60+ day streak). Stablecoins $316B ATH. DeFi TVL ~$87.2B (-3.8% 24h deleveraging). Drift $286M exploit now DPRK/Lazarus-attributed (Elliptic). BlackRock ETHB staking ETF live ($107M seed, 80% staked). CLARITY Act at 72% Polymarket.
INFRASTRUCTURE UNCHANGED: 632 published slugs. 109 published slugs missing page.tsx. 141 TS errors in 4 files. 2/6 API routes with fallback. Last deploy: e3f63fc. 22 uncommitted files.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible — all metrics from local file analysis + agent reports + web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY (v14→v15): 4 agents produced output since last standup — build-v17/v18/v19 (5+ new pages), eod-v13 (QA snapshot), design-v14 (OG assets), community-v16 (tweets #395-399, newsletter v32, 2 SVGs). Today's total: 75 agent runs across 5 types.

CONTENT VELOCITY: 66 learn guides on disk. 10 built today alone (starting from 56). Build agent averaging 2 pages/cycle with 700+ line guides consistently. Cosmos IBC covers 115+ connected chains, $1B+ monthly volume. Crypto Points covers EigenLayer/Blast/Hyperliquid farming + Sybil detection.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (8TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): 15+ learn guides uncommitted across multiple build cycles, plus 64+ OG images, metadata fixes, social assets. Deploy debt is the single critical bottleneck. Google cannot index any new content beyond e3f63fc. Every hour = lost organic traffic. Requires manual git add/commit/push.
P1 — 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX (UNCHANGED 8+ STANDUPS): Published slugs without page.tsx returning 404.
P2 — OG PARITY GAP: 64 OG SVGs for 66 learn pages — Cosmos IBC + Crypto Points need OG images (next design cycle).
P3 — PROMOTE 15+ QUEUED PAGES: All built and QA-verified pages await promotion after deploy.
P4 — JSON-LD MISSING ON 2 PAGES: Euler V2 and Hyperlane (carry-over 8+ cycles).
P5 — DEFI-YIELDS FALLBACK: Only route without hardcoded fallback (carry-over 8+ cycles).
P6 — 141 TS ERRORS: 4 files, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL — 8TH ESCALATION): 15+ uncommitted learn guides, 64+ OG images, metadata fixes, social assets. Content velocity is exceptional (10+ guides/day) but delivery to Google remains ZERO without deploy. The deploy debt compounds every cycle. 66 learn pages on disk vs whatever Google has indexed = massive gap. Single highest-ROI action remains unchanged.

PRIORITY 2 — DRIFT EXPLOIT + DPRK NARRATIVE WINDOW: Elliptic attributed $286M Drift exploit to DPRK/Lazarus Group. This is the biggest DeFi security story of 2026. Our DeFi Insurance, Wallet Security, and Solana DeFi guides are perfectly positioned. Newsletter v32 + tweets #395-399 ready. Deploy + promote captures 'DeFi security', 'Drift exploit', 'crypto hacking' queries. Window narrowing.

PRIORITY 3 — INSTITUTIONAL STAKING + FEAR ACCUMULATION: BlackRock ETHB ($107M, 80% staked), Grayscale ETHE ($1.82B, 67% staked), F&G at 8. Our LST guide, DCA Calculator, and Fear & Greed tool are positioned for both institutional and retail search traffic. $316B stablecoin dry powder at ATH. Deploy unlocks capture.
